doc_title_en: Notice of Expression of Support for Tender Offer for Company Shares by Controlling Shareholder Mitsuba Co., Ltd. and Chubu Electric Power Co., Inc., Recommendation to Participate, and Notice of Execution of Capital and Business Partnership Agreement with Chubu Electric Power Co., Inc.

key_facts.reason_jp: 親会社ミツバ及び中部電力による経営統合・完全子会社化

summary_en: Mitsuba Co. (51.31% holder) and Chubu Electric Co. to acquire all remaining RYOMO shares via tender offer at ¥2,700 per share (total ¥9,450M approx.). Post-close ownership: Mitsuba 80%, Chubu Electric 20%. Board recommends tendering. Share delisting expected. Strategic capital partnership agreement with Chubu Electric to be executed.
summary_jp: ミツバ（現在51.31%保有）と中部電力が全株式取得、1株当たり¥2,700で公開買付け。買付け後の議決権比率：ミツバ80%、中部電力20%。上場廃止予定。経営陣は応募推奨。中部電力との資本業務提携契約を締結予定。
tag_en: Take-Private – Mitsuba & Chubu Electric – ¥9,450M – Full delisting – 80/20 ownership post-close
tag_jp: スクイーズアウト – ミツバ・中部電力 – 94.5億円 – 完全子会社化・上場廃止予定 – 議決権比率80/20
